about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm Marco, a software engineer with over 7 years of experience building scalable web solutions. I specialize in architecting high-performance backend services with Go and modern frontends with React/Next.js. I've transformed manual business operations into automated, efficient systems, and led technical teams in high-growth fintech environments.
about.bioPersonal: I love to collaborate. I believe the best projects come from good communication and mutual trust. If you have an idea, let's talk — I enjoy understanding the problem before writing the first line of code.
about.processStep1Description: I understand your business, your users, and the real problem we need to solve. Without this, code doesn't matter.
about.processStep2Description: I define architecture, tech stack, and timeline. Transparent from day one — no surprises.
about.processStep3Description: I iterate fast with incremental deliveries. I integrate AI tools into the workflow to maintain speed without sacrificing quality.
about.processStep4Description: Deploy, documentation, and clean handoff. Your project works and you know how to maintain it.
